title: Introduction to Kubernetes on Azure
summary: Learn about the basics of Docker containers, container orchestration with Kubernetes, and managed clusters on Azure Kubernetes Service.

sections.title: Introduction to Kubernetes on Azure
sections.summary: Learn about the basics of Docker containers, container orchestration with Kubernetes, and managed clusters on Azure Kubernetes Service.

lessons.title: Introduction to Docker containers
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to Docker containers

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-docker-containers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Kubernetes
lessons.content_md:
Get acquainted with the Kubernetes open-source container-orchestration system for automating application deployment, scaling, and management.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-kubernetes/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:
Get acquainted with the Azure Kubernetes open-source container-orchestration system for automating application deployment, scaling, and management.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-kubernetes-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Deploy a containerized application on Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:
Explore how to create and deploy a containerized application by using Azure Kubernetes Service declarative manifest files.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/aks-deploy-container-app/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy a containerized application on Azure Kubernetes Service

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduction to Kubernetes on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduction to Kubernetes on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
